name: GitHub Embeds

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
> [!important]
> This update contains important security updates.

## What's Changed
* Limit codeblocks to a defined set of languages by @MrGVSV in https://github.com/MrGVSV/obsidian-github-embeds/pull/23


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/MrGVSV/obsidian-github-embeds/compare/1.0.6...1.0.7

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Decode file paths by @MrGVSV in https://github.com/MrGVSV/obsidian-github-embeds/pull/17
* style: add token plaintext notice to settings disclaimer section (#18) by @dgrebb in https://github.com/MrGVSV/obsidian-github-embeds/pull/19

## New Contributors
* @dgrebb made their first contribution in https://github.com/MrGVSV/obsidian-github-embeds/pull/19

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/MrGVSV/obsidian-github-embeds/compare/1.0.5...1.0.6

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Code cleanup by @MrGVSV in https://github.com/MrGVSV/obsidian-github-embeds/pull/11
* Fix UTF-8 decoding on GitHub files by @MrGVSV in https://github.com/MrGVSV/obsidian-github-embeds/pull/12
* Clarify plugin only works in Reading view by @MrGVSV in https://github.com/MrGVSV/obsidian-github-embeds/pull/13


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/MrGVSV/obsidian-github-embeds/compare/1.0.3...1.0.4
